home.tagline: Practical tools for Pokémon Scarlet & Violet
home.sandwichDesc: Recipes for Shiny Hunting with Sparkling Power Lv.3 and Encounter Power
home.evPokedexDesc: Searchable list of all Pokémon with EV yields and locations
home.evTrackerDesc: Track your team's EV training progress with Pokérus and Power Items

sandwich.title: Sandwich Builder
sandwich.subtitle: Pokémon Scarlet & Violet — Recipes for Shiny Hunt, Encounter & more
sandwich.reverseSearch: 🔎 Reverse Search — "I want this power, which recipe?"
sandwich.noRecipes: No recipes found with these filters 😅
sandwich.shinyInfo: All give Sparkling Power Lv.3 + Encounter Power Lv.3. Require 2x Herba Mystica of the same type.
sandwich.encounterInfo: No Herba Mystica needed. Great for EV farming and completing the Pokédex.
sandwich.noEncounter: No Encounter recipe for this type yet 🔧
sandwich.raidInfo: Boosts the appearance rate of specific Tera Raid types. Great for farming 5★/6★/7★ raids of a chosen type.
sandwich.breedingInfo: Egg Power reduces hatch steps. Lv.2 (no Herba) is the go-to for extended sessions; Lv.3 (Sweet Herba x2) is fastest but costs Herba Mystica.
sandwich.herbaTipNote: 💡 Tip: Do 5★+ raids with friends or online to maximize drops. Each raid can drop 0–2 Herbas.
sandwich.herba.Sweet: 5★ & 6★ Tera Raids — most common in Normal, Water, Grass type raids
sandwich.herba.Salty: 5★ & 6★ Tera Raids — most common in Rock, Steel, Ice type raids
sandwich.herba.Sour: 5★ & 6★ Tera Raids — most common in Poison, Ground, Fighting type raids
sandwich.herba.Bitter: 5★ & 6★ Tera Raids — most common in Dragon, Psychic, Ghost type raids
sandwich.herba.Spicy: 5★ & 6★ Tera Raids — most common in Fire, Electric, Dark type raids
sandwich.berryAltNote: Berries with similar flavor to the Herba Mystica used in the recipe

natureCalc.selectToComparePrompt: Select a Pokémon to compare natures
natureCalc.berryNote: Feeding berries the nature likes increases friendship faster. Feeding disliked berries reduces friendship.
